description_long: This is a modern, rectangular computer desk with a sleek black finish and subtle blue accent lighting along the edges. The desk features a large flat tabletop supporting a widescreen monitor, a full-sized keyboard, a mouse, and a pair of headphones resting on a stand. A tall, rectangular computer tower is positioned on the left side of the desk, while the right side has a mouse pad and headphone stand. The desk stands on four sturdy, straight legs, providing ample legroom beneath. The surface is smooth and glossy, giving it a high-tech, contemporary appearance. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or cable management features integrated into the desk itself.
description: A sleek black computer desk with blue accent lighting, supporting a monitor, keyboard, mouse, and computer tower. The design is modern and minimalist, with a glossy surface and sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor, keyboard, mouse, computer tower on the left, and headphones on a stand to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the monitor, the mouse pad, and the headphones resting on the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor, the computer tower on the right, and the overall width of the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the monitor and the clean, uninterrupted surface of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the monitor, keyboard, and mouse, indicated by the arrangement of computer peripherals and the open leg space beneath.
